'''Trilli''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on the [[Outbound Flight Colony]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. He served as one of the [[Peacekeeper (Outbound Flight Colony)|Peacekeepers]], helping to keep order within the remains of the original ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' vessel.<ref name="SQ" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
